name: Rollups
description: Declared aggregations materialized as ordinary collections (plan/vocabulary/14-rollup-spec.md). rollup_definitions (admin-owned) declares a source + filter + group_by + time_bucket + metrics + refresh; the daemon's rollup pass (object_daemon.process_rollups, object_rollups.py) computes the answer into target_collection, which renders via the existing generators for free because it IS a collection. No dedicated authoring page in v1 -- rollup_definitions already gets a generated admin form (docs/schema-forms.md). Target collections are NOT declared here: each is created dynamically per operator-authored definition, and its permission rule (the payoff -- a rollup can be public while its source is private) is the operator's own, granted separately once the definition exists.
